title: Coordinates On-Screen
description: Adds a coordinate HUD to your interface
body:
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48a1954f14e2e1d4816014bddff2f6e705d10158.png) **Compass HUD** is a lightweight and highly customizable mod that adds a HUD to constantly display the player's **XYZ** **coordinates** on the screen. Perfect for explorers, builders, and adventurers, this mod enhances usability and reduces the need to rely on commands like F3.
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc890647c6135bbc1e1f84d5eaec6650a8ae01d3_0.webp) ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5da0442fcc8f2d77453f4c79a2bfcb0c84b1c0fc.png) ### Compatibility Seamlessly integrates with MiniMap mods like: - **JourneyMap**; - **Xaero’s Map**. ### Performance-friendly: - **Perfect for builders**: Keep track of exact coordinates for complex projects. - **Essential for survival players**: Easily find spawners, portals, or points of interest with precise coordinates. - **Convenient and intuitive**: Forget the heavy F3 debug interface. Download Player Position HUD+ today and elevate your Minecraft gameplay! Available for all major Minecraft versions. Success Strategy: Optimized keywords: Include terms like HUD, coordinates, exploration, and lightweight in the description and tags
